title: Crunchy Shrimp Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with crunchy shrimp, perfect for a quick snack or lunch.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add melted buttery and cook for 1 minute.
Add crunchy and cook for 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.
Add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Warm the wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cooked shrimp and crunchy mixture in the center.
Fold the wrap and serve immediately.
